description: Quran recitation, verse meanings, tafsir — must always include Arabic text and verse reference

questions.question: Recite Surah Al-Fatiha (1) with full Arabic text and explain its meaning verse by verse.
What is Ayat al-Kursi (2:255)? Give the full Arabic text, translation, and its virtues from hadith.
Explain the tafsir of Surah Al-Asr (103). What does Ibn Kathir say about this surah?
What does Surah Al-Ikhlas (112) say? Give Arabic, explain why it equals one-third of the Quran.
Explain the tafsir of Surah Al-Baqarah 2:286 — 'Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.'
What is the significance of the last two verses of Surah Al-Baqarah (2:285-286)?
Explain Surah Al-Kahf 18:10. What is the story of the People of the Cave?
What does Quran 49:13 say about the origin of nations and races? Give the full Arabic and tafsir.
Explain the verse of light (Ayat al-Nur) in Surah An-Nur (24:35) with full Arabic and tafsir.
What does Surah Yasin (36) say about the signs of Allah in nature? Cite specific verses.
Explain Surah Al-Mulk (67:1-3) — the blessed one in whose hand is dominion.
What does the Quran say about Riba (interest) in Surah Al-Baqarah 2:275-279? Give the Arabic.
Explain Surah Az-Zumar 39:53 — the verse of hope and mercy for sinners.
What does Surah Al-Inshirah (94) say? Give Arabic, translation, and context of revelation.
Explain the tafsir of Surah Al-Duha (93). What was its context of revelation?
What does Quran 2:153 say about patience and prayer? Give full Arabic and explanation.
Explain Surah Al-Hujurat 49:11-12 on backbiting and suspicion.
What is the story of Prophet Ibrahim (Abraham) in the Quran? Cite key verses.
Explain Surah Al-Fajr (89) — the verse about the satisfied soul.
What does Quran 3:85 say about Islam as the only accepted religion? Give full Arabic.
